name: Yaeko Minegasaki
description: Yaeko is an urban life planner and the first, albeit minor, antagonist of Shokugeki no Soma. She is a ruthless business woman who only cares about her job and she is willing to resort to dirty tactics to ensure that she has her way. Because of her job and callous behavior, she disregards many family-owned businesses, such as Restaurant Yukihira.
